plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root cause:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7.

The loop condition `i < items.length - 1` stops one iteration too early — it never reaches the last index (`items.length - 1`), so the final element is always skipped.

### The Fix (1 line)

| File | Line | Change |
|------|------|--------|
| `src/utils.ts` | 7 | `i < items.length - 1` → `i < items.length` |

### Impact on tests
Currently **2 tests fail** because of this bug:
- *"should process all items"* — returns `["HELLO","WORLD"]` instead of `["HELLO","WORLD","FOO"]`
- *"should handle a single item"* — returns `[]` instead of `["TEST"]`

After the fix, all 6 tests (4 for `processItems` + 2 for `sum`) will pass.
